$schema: Curated keyword backlog for the daily-blog automation. The task reads this file, takes the first item with status:"pending", runs a duplicate check against existing Shopify articles, writes + publishes ONE article to the Mattress Buying Guide blog, then sets that item's status to "published" (with publishedHandle) or "skipped-duplicate" (with existing). Topics are Semrush-researched (20260625, us db) and chosen to be likely-uncovered gaps. monthlyVolume is for prioritization only.
